title: No tests for searchUsers function
description: The new searchUsers function (line 15) has no corresponding test. It handles user search with a database query but no test verifies correct results, empty queries, or SQL injection prevention.
suggestion: Add a test file tests/services/userService.test.ts with cases for: valid search returning results, empty query param, query with special characters, and no results found.

title: No tests for processUserData error paths
description: The processUserData function has no test coverage. The null dereference on userData.profile means the error path (when profile is missing) is completely untested.
suggestion: Add unit tests covering: valid userData input, missing profile field (should throw), null userData input, and empty strings for name/email.
